name: Glazed Strawberry-Rhubarb Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh rhubarb, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Prepare the pastry for a 2-crust pie.
3. Combine 1 1/4 cups sugar, salt, and flour in a bowl.
4. Arrange half of the strawberries and rhubarb in the prepared pie pan.
5. Sprinkle with half of the sugar mixture.
6. Repeat with the remaining fruit and sugar mixture.
7. Dot the top with butter.
8. Cover with the top crust and flute the edges to create a high-standing rim.
9. Brush the top of the pie with cold water and sprinkle with 1 tablespoon sugar.
10. Make steam vents in the top crust.
11. Bake in a hot oven (425°F) for 40 to 50 minutes, or until the rhubarb is tender and the crust is golden brown.
